portal.title: Add an institution portal
portal.description: Enter the public portal root. The integration detects CKAN or Socrata and stores the portal as one catalog entry. Use Configure on that entry to discover datasets; every selected dataset becomes its own independently updating integration instance.

dataset.title: Add a dataset directly
dataset.description: Paste a CKAN or Socrata dataset page, API endpoint, or dataset identifier. A portal URL is only needed for a bare dataset identifier.

data.portal_url: Portal URL for a bare identifier (optional)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the portal.
error.invalid_portal: The location is not a supported CKAN or Socrata portal.
error.invalid_dataset: The dataset location could not be resolved or validated.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This portal or dataset is already configured.

init.title: Configure open data source
init.description: Portal entries show ranked public datasets. Selecting one launches a separate dataset integration. Dataset entries allow entity field selection.
